description: State-space-first, admission-based micro-plan program for aligning homeostasis with the asset-control-model substrate under reiterative closure.

nodes.question: What operational subsystem entities, variables, interfaces, transitions, and disturbances exist, and what epistemic/control/governance state model governs how evidence about that system becomes accepted state and applied control?
reiterate_when: new finding requires a new state class
new operational entity or interface class is required
a transition crosses state layers in an undefined way
authority status of a state layer changes
fidelity review exposes missing state semantics

nodes.question: How does the composed operational plus accepted-state model map into the root, observation, relationship, identity, and control planes, and what qualifies as an admissible discovery anchor?

state_space_unresolved.when: plane definition depends on unresolved state taxonomy, transition rules, or authority rules

reiterate_when: projection surfaces threaten to become authority surfaces

nodes.question: Which subjects satisfy anchor admissibility and can currently be treated as candidate scope roots, control roots, and crawl boundaries, starting with runtime_environment and codex?

plane_model_unresolved.when: root discovery depends on unresolved state-to-plane mapping

anchor_admissibility_unresolved.when: root discovery depends on unresolved anchor admission criteria

nodes.question: How are controller conflicts, precedence, invalid overlap, and tie-breaks resolved across the admitted root candidates, expected to start with runtime_environment and codex?

missing_root_scope.when: controller arbitration depends on unresolved root or scope_root definitions

nodes.question: What provisional identity hypotheses, assumptions, and FSM-fit probes are needed for each root candidate before relationship-driven identity materialization occurs?

controller_rules_unresolved.when: identity scoping depends on unresolved controller precedence

reiterate_when: an admitted delta invalidates provisional identity hypotheses
new relationship effect invalidates provisional identity assumptions

nodes.question: How are findings admitted into canonical relationship state, and how do relationship deltas materialize accepted identity?

identity_hypothesis_unresolved.when: relationship identity effects cannot be classified against provisional identity hypotheses

reiterate_when: admitted relationship delta changes accepted identity
graph projection semantics drift from canonical JSON

nodes.question: Given accepted identity and accepted relationship state, what is controlled, uncontrolled, ambiguous, or missing, and what must be re-analyzed?

identity_changed.when: accepted identity changed during control analysis

relationship_changed.when: relationship findings introduce new identity-affecting edges

controller_conflict_unresolved.when: control analysis discovers unresolved controller overlap or precedence drift

reiterate_when: relationship.current introduces new controller or actuator reach
new unknown or undisclosed operation is observed

nodes.question: Do the schema and applied-control models represent the accepted model with high fidelity, and what operational methodology follows from that state?

state_space_incomplete.when: accepted model state cannot be represented within the defined state taxonomy or authority model

plane_mapping_incomplete.when: accepted truth or control behavior crosses planes without a defined host or boundary

schema_incomplete.when: accepted model state cannot be represented with high fidelity

control_fidelity_failed.when: applied control does not match accepted identity or intended outputs and byproducts

nodes.question: Is the micro-plan program approved as a planning foundation, and is implementation approved yet?
